bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Welcome back Sign in to continue to Proofound EMAIL ADDRESS * PASSWORD * Remember me Forgot password? Sign in OR CONTINUE WITH Google LinkedIn Don't have an account? Create account By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
label: login
title: Sign In | Proofound

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Back Join Proofound Choose the account type that fits how you'll use Proofound. Individual For professionals who want a clean proof-based portfolio link they can share today, plus matching as they grow. Continue as Individual → Organization For organizations that need a credible trust page on day 1, then one assignment and a privacy-safe shortlist. Continue as Organization → Already have an account? Sign in By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
label: signup
title: Sign Up | Proofound

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Create your individual account Start with a calm proof-first account. You can add details after sign-up. EMAIL ADDRESS PASSWORD CONFIRM PASSWORD I agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service* Send me updates about new features and matching opportunities Create account OR CONTINUE WITH Google LinkedIn Already have an account? Sign in By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
label: signup-individual
title: Individual Sign Up | Proofound

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Create your organization account Start with a calm proof-first account. You can add details after sign-up. EMAIL ADDRESS PASSWORD CONFIRM PASSWORD I agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service* Send me updates about new features and matching opportunities Create organization account OR CONTINUE WITH Google LinkedIn Already have an account? Sign in By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
label: signup-organization
title: Organization Sign Up | Proofound

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Reset your password Enter your email and we'll send one secure reset link. Nothing else changes until you use it. Email Send reset link ← Back to login
label: reset-password
title: Reset Password | Proofound

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Set new password Choose a new password for your Proofound account. New password Confirm password Reset password ← Back to login
label: reset-password-confirm
title: Proofound - Focus on what matters

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Verification failed No verification token provided The verification link may have expired or is invalid. Please try signing up again or contact support. Sign up again Go to login
label: verify-email
title: Verify Email | Proofound

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Verification failed The link could not be verified. You can retry from settings. Verification token is missing. Please check your email for the correct link. Common issues: The verification link has expired (links expire after 24 hours) The link has already been used The link is invalid or incomplete Try again from settings Go to Profile
label: verify-work-email
title: Proofound - Focus on what matters
